sites.title: Sites

table.noIvtRecords: No bot records found in the last 24 hours

help.totalRequests: The total number of visits or page loads recorded across your monitored sites in the last 24 hours.
help.blockedRequests: The number of incoming requests that were blocked because they matched a security rule.
help.blockRate: The percentage of incoming requests that were blocked because they matched a security rule.
help.uniqueIps: The number of distinct IP addresses that sent requests in the last 24 hours. A sudden spike may indicate a coordinated attack.
help.activePolicies: The number of active security profiles (rule sets) currently protecting your backend services.
help.totalRules: The total number of individual security rules across all active security profiles.
help.ivtDetected: The number of requests identified as bot-generated based on behavioral and fingerprint analysis.
help.topAttackVector: The security rule that has been triggered most frequently. A high count may indicate a targeted attack pattern.
help.botTrafficRate: The percentage of detected traffic classified as automated (non-human) activity.
help.trafficTrend: This chart shows how total, allowed, and blocked traffic has changed over the last 24 hours. A rising 'Blocked' line indicates increasing bot or malicious activity.
help.botDistribution: Breakdown of detected non-human traffic by category. 'Automated Traffic' refers to known bots; 'Suspicious Traffic' refers to unverified but anomalous requests.
help.recentClassifications: A log of individual requests classified as bot or suspicious. Each row shows when the request occurred, where it came from, and what action was taken.
help.topCountries: The countries generating the most traffic to your sites, with a breakdown of total vs. blocked requests per country.
help.countryDetails: Detailed per-country breakdown of requests, blocks, and block rates to help identify geographic attack patterns.
help.ruleChangeHistory: A complete audit trail of all security rule modifications, including who made the change, when, and what was changed.
